ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-03-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 8/22/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 8/12/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY TO GIVE WRITTEN NOTICE. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT APPLIES. PLAINTIFF INDICATED THAT CASE IS AT ISSUE. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE PATHOLOGY REPORT BY 5/20/05. CT TO BE PROVIDED BY 5/6/05. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 6/24/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)

Keith Shaw, Esq. of of Brayton & Purcell, 415-898-1555 for plaintiff and opposing party Walter Cozad

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT FAMILIAN CORPORATION ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS FERGUSON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CONCERNING WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS CONTAINING FAMILIAN PRODUCTS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FALSE RERESENTATION, BUT DENIED AS TO ALL THER CAUSES OF ACTIONS.
